title: Mirroring for Sub-Items
excerpt: It would be great if the Mirroring /linking items between dashboards was implemented for Sub-Items. Currently it’s a good start, but it’s not particularly practical or useful without the ability to do this with Sub-Items…

posts.author: CR_Stewart (Chris)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if the Mirroring /linking items between dashboards was implemented for Sub-Items. Currently it’s a good start, but it’s not particularly practical or useful without the ability to do this with Sub-Items as well.
